metadata.title: OptifAI — Custom web and software development in Paraguay
metadata.description: A development agency based in Asunción. We build custom systems, landing pages and online stores that simplify operations and bring in new business. Free quotes.
metadata.ogAlt: OptifAI — custom web and software development
metadata.keywords: web development Paraguay, custom software Asunción, landing page, online store, management systems

hero.badge: Web and software development from Asunción, Paraguay
hero.subtitle: We build custom systems, landing pages and online stores designed to simplify your operations, bring in new opportunities and grow alongside your company.
hero.whatsappMessage: Hello, I found OptifAI's website and would like to discuss a project.

mockup.label: Illustration of a management dashboard with metrics and automations

services.title: Solutions Categorized by Goals
services.subtitle: We start from what your business actually needs to fix: manual work, online presence, sales, and everything in between.
services.secondarySubtitle: A project doesn't end at launch. These services cover the day to day.

custom-software.name: Custom systems
custom-software.description: Platforms and internal tools built around the way your team already works, instead of the other way round. Fewer scattered spreadsheets, fewer tasks repeated by hand.

landing.name: Landing pages
landing.description: Fast, focused pages built so a visit ends in an enquiry, a sign-up or a sale. A natural fit for advertising campaigns.

ecommerce.name: Online stores
ecommerce.description: Ecommerce shaped around your catalogue and the way you sell, with a cart, order management, payment methods and direct WhatsApp contact.

maintenance.name: Maintenance and support
maintenance.description: Fixes, updates, improvements and monitoring after launch, with someone available when you need a hand.

integrations.name: Integrations
integrations.description: We connect your site or system with WhatsApp, payment gateways, email, forms, APIs and the tools you already use.

hosting.name: Hosting and domain
hosting.description: Keep your own hosting and domain, or hand the technical side over to us and stop worrying about configuration.

seo.name: Technical SEO
seo.description: Work on structure, speed, metadata and indexing so your site is easier to find and easier to navigate.

notes.integrations: Available integrations depend on the project and the country. We can look at options such as Mercado Pago, Stripe or other alternatives case by case.
notes.seo: We work on the technical quality of your site. We don't promise specific search engine rankings.

benefits.title: Why Choose Us
benefits.subtitle: Beyond the technology, what makes a project go well is how it's run.

tailored.name: Built around your business
tailored.description: We start from your real processes. No squeezing your operation into a generic product.

communication.name: Direct communication
communication.description: You talk to the people writing the code. No middlemen, no answers that take days.

responsive.name: Responsive design
responsive.description: Everything we deliver works properly on phones, tablets and desktops from day one.

maintainable.name: Maintainable code
maintainable.description: We write for whoever opens the project six months from now, whether that's you, your team or another provider.

stages.name: Progress in stages
stages.description: The project is split into stages with visible deliverables, and payments follow that progress.

support.name: Support after launch
support.description: Going live isn't the end. We stay available for adjustments, improvements and questions.

scalable.name: Ready to grow
scalable.description: Solutions are built so new features can be added later without starting from scratch.

transparency.name: Transparency
transparency.description: Scope, timelines and costs are defined and discussed before anything starts.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A clear path, from the first conversation to ongoing support.
process.note: How long each stage takes depends on the scope and complexity of the project. We define that together before starting.

conversation.name: First conversation
conversation.description: You tell us what your business needs and which processes you would like to optimize. There is no commitment or cost.

discovery.name: Discovery and scope
discovery.description: We review processes, priorities, and requirements to clearly define the project's goals and scope.

proposal.name: Proposal and planning
proposal.description: We present the proposed solution, the quote, the payment stages and a realistic time estimate.

build.name: Design and development
build.description: We work through structured stages, with defined partial deliveries so you can review and validate the project's progress.

launch.name: Testing, launch, and support
launch.description: We perform quality checks, make the agreed adjustments, launch the project, and continue providing post-launch support.

projects.title: Work and project types
projects.subtitle: Projects published with permission.
projects.placeholderNotice: Projects identified as examples are reference formats and do not correspond to real clients.

af-functional-training.solution: Custom-built system designed to centralize a gym’s operational management.

cta.title: Working on something similar?
cta.description: Tell us what you need and we'll look at it together.

testimonials.title: What clients say
testimonials.emptyDescription: We'd rather wait until we have real, authorised client feedback before showing it here. This section will be filled in with verifiable testimonials.

clients.title: Clients who have trusted OptifAI
clients.subtitle: Logos are published only with permission.
clients.emptyDescription: This section is ready to show only real, authorised clients.

about.title: About OptifAI
about.lead: OptifAI is a development team based in Asunción, Paraguay, building custom digital solutions.
about.body: We stay with the project from defining the scope through to launch, and can continue afterwards with support and maintenance. We work with local clients and remotely with businesses across the Americas.
about.closing: We want to understand the problem before proposing a solution. That's why the first conversation is always about your business, not about technology.

local.name: Based in Asunción
local.description: Local work, with availability for remote clients across the Americas.

endToEnd.name: From idea to launch
endToEnd.description: Definition, design, development, testing and going live.

continuity.name: Continuity
continuity.description: Support and maintenance available after delivery.

faq.title: Common questions before starting
faq.subtitle: If something isn't answered here, write to us and we'll talk it through.

request.question: How do I request a quote?
request.answer: Fill in the contact form on this page or message us on WhatsApp. The more you tell us about what you need, the more accurate the proposal will be. If it helps, we can set up a call to work through the details.

cost.question: Is the quote free?
cost.answer: Yes. Reviewing your needs and preparing a proposal with scope, stages and costs is free and carries no commitment.

duration.question: How long does a project take?
duration.answer: It varies depending on the complexity of the project. After evaluating your requirements during the initial discovery phase, we provide a precise timeline estimate before starting, helping ensure delivery on schedule and as agreed.

payments.question: How are payments organised?
payments.answer: We work with payments split into stages, tied to the project's progress. The number of stages and the amounts are set out in the proposal before we begin.

international.question: Do you work with clients outside Paraguay?
international.answer: Yes. We work with local clients and remotely with businesses in other countries across the Americas. We arrange communication around each client's time zone.

hosting.question: Can I manage my own domain and hosting?
hosting.answer: Yes, and it's a perfectly good option: the domain and hosting stay in your name and under your control. If you'd rather not deal with the technical side, we can handle setup and maintenance for you.

maintenance.question: Do you offer maintenance?
maintenance.answer: Yes. After launch we can continue with fixes, updates, improvements and monitoring. It's agreed based on what the project needs.

existing.question: Can you improve an existing system or site?
existing.answer: Usually yes. We start by reviewing the current state of the project and its code. Sometimes improving what exists is the right call; other times rebuilding works out better over the medium term. We'll tell you straight which of the two we'd recommend and why.

integrations.question: Do you work with payment and WhatsApp integrations?
integrations.answer: Yes. The specific options depend on the project, the country and each platform's requirements. We assess this during discovery and confirm what's feasible before including it in the proposal.

start.question: What do you need to get started?
start.answer: A description of your business and the problem you want to solve is enough to start the conversation. If you already have references, copy, a logo or access credentials, bring them along; if not, we'll put those together as we go.

finalCta.title: Your next digital solution can start today
finalCta.description: Tell us what your business needs. We'll look at the project and put together a proposal at no cost.
finalCta.reassurance: We reply to every enquiry. No commitment.

contact.title: Tell us about your project
contact.subtitle: Fill in the form and we'll reply with the next steps. You can also message us on WhatsApp if you'd prefer something quicker.

fields.name: Full name
fields.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what your business does and what you need to solve.

validation.nameMin: Enter your full name (at least 2 characters).
validation.emailMax: That email address is too long.
validation.phoneInvalid: The number can only contain digits, spaces and the symbols + ( ) - .
validation.messageMin: Tell us a bit more (at least 20 characters).

status.errorsTitle: Please check the details you entered
status.successBody: We've received your enquiry and will reply to the email address you gave us.
status.devBody: The data validated correctly and was logged to the server console. No real email was sent because RESEND_API_KEY is not configured yet.
status.errorBody: Something went wrong while processing the submission. Try again in a few minutes or message us on WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: Custom web and software development from Asunción, Paraguay. Systems, landing pages and online stores for businesses that want to grow.

legal.reviewNotice: This text is an initial reference version. It should be reviewed by a legal professional before the site goes live.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.metaDescription: How OptifAI handles the data it receives through its website.
privacy.intro: This policy describes what data OptifAI receives through this site, what it is used for, and what choices you have about it.

data.title: Data we receive
data.body: We only receive the data you voluntarily enter in the contact form: full name, email address, mobile number, project type (optional) and the message you write. We do not ask for sensitive data or payment information through this site.

purpose.title: What we use it for
purpose.body: We use that data for one purpose: to answer your enquiry and, if we move forward, to coordinate the project. We do not use it for bulk marketing or for purposes unrelated to your original contact.

sharing.title: Who it is shared with
sharing.body: We do not sell or transfer your data to third parties. To operate, the site relies on service providers that process information on our behalf, such as the hosting provider and the email delivery service. These providers access the data only as far as needed to provide their service.

retention.title: How long it is kept
retention.body: We keep the messages we receive for as long as they are needed to handle the enquiry and maintain a record of the business relationship. If you'd prefer us to delete your data sooner, you can ask us to.

cookies.title: Cookies and local storage
cookies.body: This site does not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies. We store only your language and theme (light or dark) preferences locally in your browser, so the site appears the way you chose.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You can ask us to access, correct or delete the data we hold about you. To do so, write to the contact address below and we'll respond within a reasonable time.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any question about this policy, write to us at {email}.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.body: We may update this policy if our services or the applicable requirements change. The current version will always be published on this page, along with its update date.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.metaDescription: Conditions for using the OptifAI website and the scope of the information published on it.
terms.intro: These conditions govern the use of this website. The details of each project are agreed separately, in the corresponding proposal.

scope.title: Scope of this site
scope.body: This site is informational: it presents OptifAI's services and offers ways to get in touch. The information published here is not a contractual offer or a commitment to provide services.

quotes.title: Enquiries and quotes
quotes.body: Submitting the contact form creates no obligation for either party. Quotes are prepared individually, at no cost, and set out scope, stages and conditions. A project is only considered agreed once both parties accept a specific proposal.

services.title: Delivery of services
services.body: The timelines, deliverables and responsibilities of each project are defined in the accepted proposal. Any time estimates published on this site are indicative and depend on scope, complexity and the availability of the information and access provided by the client.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.body: The contents of this site, including text, design and graphic elements, belong to OptifAI unless stated otherwise. Ownership of the code and materials developed for each client is defined in that project's individual agreement.

thirdParty.title: Third-party services
thirdParty.body: Some projects may require third-party services such as hosting, domains, payment gateways or external APIs. Those services are governed by their own terms and pricing, and their availability is outside OptifAI's control.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: We aim to keep the information on this site accurate and up to date, but we do not guarantee that it is free of errors or that the site will be available without interruption. OptifAI is not responsible for decisions taken solely on the basis of the informational content published here.

links.title: External links
links.body: This site may include links to third-party sites. We do not control their content or policies and accept no responsibility for them.

law.title: Applicable law
law.body: These conditions are governed by the laws of the Republic of Paraguay. Any dispute will first be addressed in good faith between the parties before other avenues are pursued.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may amend these conditions at any time. The version in force is the one published on this page, along with its update date.

common.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.
common.errorBody: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page.
